query:
SELECT id, userId, 
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 20) as refresh_token_start
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute SELECT id, userId, 
  LENGTH(tastytradeRefreshToken) as refresh_token_length,
  LENGTH(tastytradeClientSecret) as client_secret_length,
  SUBSTR(tastytradeRefreshToken, 1, 20) as refresh_token_start
FROM apiCredentials WHERE userId = 1;
